channel.title: Bootstrap on Jeremy Pellerino | Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Bootstrap on Jeremy Pellerino | Portfolio

item.title: Tic-Tac-Toe
item.description: This is yet another rendition of the tic-tac-toe game. My first application written with ReactJS, it establishes the use of ReactJS basics like React.createElement and ReactDOM.createRoot to build the site. The AI is based on the minimax algorithm.

item.title: Homepage
item.description:
My website has been in many forms. The latest involves static site generation via Hugo, a standalone HTML generation package written in Go.

Hugo builds the site using the defined templates and layouts, and does so using GitHub Actions, which builds the site efficiently server-side every time I push. That means that the site can be efficiently managed locally, but be stored efficiently (e.g., minified) on the server.
